description: I observed the bird for 10 minutes as it stood quietly on a rock in shallow water about 1 foot from the shore. I happened upon it and it was not bothered by my closeness. I had been observing shorebirds when I noticed it. The sun was behind the bird but it was quite distinctive with very white and contrasting black coloration. The head appeared rounded. The black cap was very extensive. Bill was short and dark red in color. Legs were very short, orange in color. He moved around on the rock. The tail seemed longer than the wingtips. I looked away for a few moments and while my back was turned the bird very quietly flew off and I did not see it in flight.
photographer: Photographer: Patricia Henschen, Patricia Henschen, Patricia Henschen, Patricia Henschen, Patricia Henschen
